entries.title: Doctoral Researcher
bullets: PhD Student with the Predictive Systems in Biomedicine (PRISM) Lab at the Tissue Image Analytics (TIA) Centre.

Working on SpyGlass, developing machine-learning methods for computational pathology to analyse whole-slide histopathology images, discover clinically relevant biomarkers, and improve disease characterisation.

entries.title: Visiting Researcher - Machine Learning (Object Detection)
bullets: Designed a YOLOv8 animal-movement tracking pipeline for behavioural experiments, achieving 98.29% mAP.
Annotated and processed 8,000 video frames using Roboflow for model training.
Coauthored a manuscript on depression-like behaviour in zebrafish using a pipeline to analyze 10 hours of data.
Conducted statistical analyses to uncover context-specific advantages of behaviours typically perceived as unfavourable.

entries.title: Research Assistant - Generative AI
bullets: Worked on methods for text-conditioned oral cancer image synthesis.
Leveraged cross-attention-based concept learning to improve embeddings.
Used textual inversion, latent diffusion, and multi-concept-prompt-learning to improve diffusion model performance.

entries.title: Research Assistant - Generative AI
bullets: Advised by Prof. Debayan Gupta.
Enhanced a text-conditioned latent diffusion model, improving FID from 22.39 to 21.11 with 7% lower GPU memory usage.
Conducted literature review and authored a pre-print manuscript under review.

entries.title: Research Assistant - Machine Learning
entries.organization: Trivedi School of Biosciences, Ashoka University
bullets: Developed and technically validated India's first multi-centre, nationwide oral cancer image dataset with over 300,000 annotated images through a pan-India collaboration using TensorFlow and HPC runtimes.
Coauthored the Scientific Data manuscript introducing the dataset and its technical details, supported by Zenodo.

entries.title: Research Intern - Machine Learning
entries.organization: Centre for Healthcare Analytics and Research Trends, Ashoka University
bullets: Codesigned a tuberculosis diagnostic model using MFCC-based feature extraction and an ANN, achieving 92.9% accuracy and sixth place in the CODA TB DREAM Challenge 2023.
Served as a consortium editor for the challenge manuscript published in Open Forum Infectious Diseases.

entries.title: Research Intern - Machine Learning
entries.organization: Mphasis Labs for Machine Learning and Computational Thinking
bullets: Cofounded a student-led research think tank integrating machine learning with breast cancer research and collaborating with scientists from institutions worldwide.
Created reproducible Python workflows with PyTorch, TensorFlow, HPC, and Conda to handle multi-modal data from medical centres across India.

entries.title: Teaching Fellow - AI for Tomorrow's World
Teaching Assistant
bullets: Assisted in teaching CS1206 - Design and Analysis of Algorithms.
Focused on dynamic programming and competitive coding style problems.
Graded assignments, quizzes, and exams, and streamlined discussions for effective learning.

entries.title: Teaching Assistant
bullets: Assisted in teaching CSL2010 - Introduction to Machine Learning.
Graded assignments, quizzes, and exams; facilitated discussions.

entries.title: Teaching Assistant
bullets: Assisted in teaching CS2378 - The New Geography of the Information Age.
Supported development of technical student projects.
Graded assignments, quizzes, and exams; facilitated classroom discussions.

entries.title: Teaching Assistant
bullets: Assisted in teaching CS1230 - Data Structures 1.
Focused on tree structures and dynamic programming.
Graded assignments/exams and held tutorials and additional lectures.

entries.title: Teaching Assistant
bullets: Assisted in teaching CS2378 - The New Geography of the Information Age.
Focused on student research ideas related to surveillance and technology.
Graded assignments, quizzes, and exams; facilitated effective discussions.

entries.title: Doctor of Philosophy (PhD), Computer Science
bullets: Doctoral student at the Tissue Image Analytics (TIA) Centre.
Working on SpyGlass, developing machine-learning methods for computational pathology and whole-slide histopathology image analysis.

entries.title: Master of Science (MS), Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
bullets: Thesis: Controlled Synthesis in Cancer Histopathology: HistoCPA and CHiRP-Path.
Graduated with Distinction and served as course representative for the MSc AI/ML programme.

entries.title: Postgraduate Diploma in Advanced Studies and Research, Computer Science
bullets: Received the Bronze Medal for Academic Achievement and graduated magna cum laude.
Teaching Assistant for more than four undergraduate courses and cofounder of the research reading group.

entries.title: Bachelor's Degree, Computer Science
bullets: President of the Academic Society for Computer Science and Peer Mentor.
Received the Singapore International Pre-Graduate Award (SIPGA) for research.

entries.title: Presentation of the session
entries.organization: Warwick Pathology Computing and Computer Science Symposium

entries.title: Global Masters International Scholarship
bullets: Received a £2,000 award for exceptional academic achievement and research acumen.

entries.title: Magna Cum Laude in PgD
bullets: Graduated in the top 10% of the class of 2024 with a GPA of 3.8/4.0.

entries.title: Bronze Medal in Computer Science
bullets: Awarded for achieving the third-highest GPA in the Computer Science department.

entries.title: Dean's List
bullets: Recognised for an exceptional GPA in Fall 2023 and Winter 2024.

entries.title: Student Travel Grant and Award
bullets: Received a $1,200 award for research presented at ISMB/ECCB 2023.

entries.title: Singapore International Pre-Graduate Award
entries.organization: Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR)
bullets: Received a $6,000 grant and an attachment to the Bioinformatics Institute of Singapore for research excellence.
